name: Navbar Simple
html:
Mi Sitio
  • Inicio
  • Servicios
  • Nosotros
  • Contacto
css: .navbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 15px 30px; background: #1e293b; } .navbar-brand a { font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; color: #e2e8f0; text-decoration: none; } .navbar-menu { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 25px; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .navbar-menu a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; } .navbar-menu a:hover { color: #3b82f6; }

name: Navbar con Logo
html:
Inicio Servicios
LOGO
Blog Contacto
css: .navbar-logo { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 15px 30px; background: #0f172a; } .navbar-left, .navbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .navbar-center { position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .navbar-logo-text { font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; color: #e2e8f0; text-decoration: none; } .nav-link { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; } .nav-link:hover { color: #3b82f6; }

name: Navbar Responsive
html:
Mi Sitio
  • Inicio
  • Servicios
  • Nosotros
  • Contacto
css: .navbar-responsive { flex-direction: column; } .navbar-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; padding: 10px; cursor: pointer; } .navbar-toggle span { width: 25px; height: 3px; background: #e2e8f0; transition: 0.3s; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .navbar-toggle { display: flex; } .navbar-menu { display: none; width: 100%; flex-direction: column; } .navbar-menu.active { display: flex; } }

name: Breadcrumb
html:
1. Inicio
  2. Categoría
  3. Página actual
css: .breadcrumb { padding: 15px 0; } .breadcrumb-list { display: flex; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; gap: 10px; } .breadcrumb-list li { display: flex; align-items: center; } .breadcrumb-list li:not(:last-child)::after { content: '/'; margin-left: 10px; color: #64748b; } .breadcrumb-list a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; } .breadcrumb-list a:hover { color: #3b82f6; } .breadcrumb-list span { color: #e2e8f0; }

name: Tabs Navigation
html:
Contenido Tab 1
Contenido Tab 2
Contenido Tab 3
css: .tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 2px solid #334155; margin-bottom: 20px; } .tab { padding: 12px 24px; background: none; border: none; color: #94a3b8; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -2px; transition: all 0.3s; } .tab:hover { color: #e2e8f0; } .tab.active { color: #3b82f6; border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; } .tab-pane { display: none; } .tab-pane.active { display: block; }

name: Pagination
html: « 1 2 3 »
css: .pagination { display: flex; gap: 5px; } .pagination-link { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 15px; background: #1e293b; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: all 0.3s; } .pagination-link:hover { background: #334155; color: #e2e8f0; } .pagination-link.active { background: #3b82f6; color: white; }
